headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Caterpillar, Raises Price Target to $817
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Kristen Owen   maintains Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $729 to $817.

headline: 1 Industrials Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Avoid
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 12.5% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 5.6% return.

headline: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.
